title: iberis sempervirens subsp. saxatilis
intro: Iberis sempervirens subsp. saxatilis, also known as rock candytuft or saxatile candytuft, is a perennial herb belonging to the Brassicaceae family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, this plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Iberis sempervirens subsp. saxatilis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the leaves or flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
